problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
hypothesis: If Self-assembled monolayer for surface functionalization is applied to microcracks, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
